ddls:
CREATE TABLE "phenotypes" (
  "phenotype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phenotype */,
  "phenotype_URI" TEXT /* URI of the phenotype in the ontology */,
  "phenotype_label" TEXT /* Human-readable label for the phenotype */,
  "phenotype_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the phenotype */,
  "phenotype_type" TEXT /* Type of phenotype (e.g., morphological, physiological) */,
  "phenotype_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the phenotype (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  "phenotype_measurement" TEXT /* Specific measurement or metric associated with the phenotype (e.g., length, weight) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phenotype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anatomical_entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anatomical entity */,
  "entity_URI" TEXT /* URI of the entity in the ontology */,
  "entity_label" TEXT /* Human-readable label for the entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of anatomical entity (e.g., organ, cell, tissue) */,
  "entity_parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent entity (to establish a hierarchical relationship) */,
  "entity_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the anatomical entity */,
  "entity_function" TEXT /* Primary function of the anatomical entity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_URI" TEXT /* URI of the location in the ontology */,
  "location_label" TEXT /* Human-readable label for the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., organ, tissue, cell) */,
  "location_parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent location (to establish a hierarchical relationship) */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the location */,
  "location_coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates or spatial information of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phenotype_entity" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association */,
  "phenotype_id" INTEGER /* ID of the phenotype */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the anatomical entity */,
  "association_type" TEXT /* Type of association between the phenotype and the anatomical entity (e.g., direct, indirect) */,
  "association_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phenotype_entity_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES anatomical_entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phenotype_entity_phenotype_id FOREIGN KEY ("phenotype_id") REFERENCES phenotypes ("phenotype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entity_location" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the anatomical entity */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "association_type" TEXT /* Type of association between the anatomical entity and the location (e.g., direct, indirect) */,
  "association_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entity_location_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entity_location_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES anatomical_entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organisms" (
  "organism_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organism */,
  "organism_name" TEXT /* Name of the organism */,
  "taxonomy" TEXT /* Taxonomy classification of the organism */,
  "organism_common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the organism */,
  "organism_species" TEXT /* Species of the organism */,
  "organism_genus" TEXT /* Genus of the organism */,
  "organism_family" TEXT /* Family of the organism */,
  "organism_order" TEXT /* Order of the organism */,
  "organism_class" TEXT /* Class of the organism */,
  "organism_phylum" TEXT /* Phylum of the organism */,
  "organism_kingdom" TEXT /* Kingdom of the organism */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organism_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organism_phenotype" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association */,
  "organism_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organism */,
  "phenotype_id" INTEGER /* ID of the phenotype */,
  "observation_date" TEXT /* Date when the phenotype was observed */,
  "observation_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_organism_phenotype_phenotype_id FOREIGN KEY ("phenotype_id") REFERENCES phenotypes ("phenotype_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_organism_phenotype_organism_id FOREIGN KEY ("organism_id") REFERENCES organisms ("organism_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_title" TEXT /* Title of the study */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication of the study */,
  "study_type" TEXT /* Type of study (e.g., experimental, observational) */,
  "study_funding" TEXT /* Funding source for the study */,
  "study_status" TEXT /* Current status of the study (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "study_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose or objective of the study */,
  "study_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords or tags associated with the study */,
  "study_publication_status" TEXT /* Publication status of the study (e.g., published, in review) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_organism" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "organism_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organism */,
  "association_type" TEXT /* Type of association between the study and the organism (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  "association_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_organism_organism_id FOREIGN KEY ("organism_id") REFERENCES organisms ("organism_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_organism_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher */,
  "researcher_role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the study (e.g., principal investigator, co-investigator) */,
  "researcher_specialization" TEXT /* Specialization or field of expertise of the researcher */,
  "researcher_publications" TEXT /* List of the researcher's publications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)
